GRules.GeneralRules1: Three Crazy Piggies is a 5-reels (3 rows in reel 3, 4 rows in reels 1, 2, 4 and 5) video slot featuring symbol transformations and x10 multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{768} ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 3,600 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

GRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

GPayout.Title: Symbol Payout Values
GPayout.PayoutExplanination1: Wild symbol and Wild Wolf symbol substitute for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
GPayout.PayoutExplanination2: Wild symbol appears on reel 3 only.

GWildSymbolInReel3.Title: Wild Symbol in Reel 3
GWildSymbolInReel3.WildSymbolInReel3Explanination1: During any round, if any Wild symbol appears on reel 3 and there is a win, the Wild symbol will be collected before wins are paid.
GWildSymbolInReel3.WildSymbolInReel3Explanination2: During any round after the first Wild symbol is collected, all Wolf symbols will be transformed into Wild Wolf symbols.
GWildSymbolInReel3.WildSymbolInReel3Explanination3: During any round after the second Wild symbol is collected, all Spade symbols, Heart symbols, Club symbols and Diamond symbols will be removed from the reels.
GWildSymbolInReel3.WildSymbolInReel3Explanination4: During any round after the third Wild symbol is collected, all wins will be multiplied by x10.
GWildSymbolInReel3.WildSymbolInReel3Explanination5: After the third Wild symbol is collected, additional Wild symbols will not be collected.

GFreeSpinsFeature.Title: Free Spins Feature
GFreeSpinsFeature.FreeSpinsFeatureExplanination1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
GFreeSpinsFeature.FreeSpinsFeatureExplanination2: During any free spin, all Wolf symbols will be transformed into Wild Wolf symbols.
GFreeSpinsFeature.FreeSpinsFeatureExplanination3: During any free spin, all Spade symbols, Heart symbols, Club symbols and Diamond symbols will be removed from the reels.
GFreeSpinsFeature.FreeSpinsFeatureExplanination4: During any free spin, all wins will be multiplied by x10.

GMaximumWin.Title: Maximum Win
GMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplanination1: The maximum win amount is %{2500}x of the bet amount.
GMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplanination2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{2500}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

GFeatureBuy.Title: Feature Buy
GFeatureBuy.FeatureBuyExplanination1: Tap on Feature Buy button to open the Feature Buy menu.
GFeatureBuy.FeatureBuyExplanination2: Tap on Start button to buy the Free Spins Feature at the price displayed in the Feature Buy menu.

GBetWays.Title: %{768} Ways
GBetWays.BetWaysExplanination1: Bet ways win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to the right.
GBetWays.BetWaysExplanination2: Total number of winning bet ways for each symbol are calculated by multiplying the number of adjacent winning symbols for each symbol from the leftmost reel to the right.
GBetWays.BetWaysExplanination3: The winning symbol payout is multiplied by the number of winning bet ways.
GBetWays.BetWaysExplanination4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
GBetWays.BetWaysExplanination5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
